creator: editor@callfortesting.org
text:
Hardware: Ivy Bridge ThinkPad X1 Carbon, ThinkPad X230, "Let's Note"
Releases: 13.1*, 13.2*

During installation from memstick or disc1, the WiFi configuration fails to scan for networks, reporting: "No wireless networks were found. Rescan?" and Rescan does not help.

Tested workaround: Do not set an FCC region
Suggested but untested workaround: Enter the emergency shell and type:

ifconfig wlan0 down
ifconfig wlan0 up
